name: cyber-memory
description: A human-like memory system for AI companions: selective recall, emotional state, reconsolidation, relationship memories, prospective memory, and multimodal memory.

scripts.test: node examples/logic.test.js && node examples/emotion.test.js && node examples/ontology.test.js && node examples/state.test.js && node examples/engine.test.js && node examples/reconsolidate.test.js && node examples/relationship.test.js && node examples/prospective.test.js && node examples/modal.test.js && node examples/dedup.test.js && node examples/orchestrator.test.js && node examples/scheduler.test.js
